description: Flex-wrap container for grouping multiple TmChip components with consistent spacing and an optional disabled state.

parameters.name: Disabled
parameters.description: Whether the chip group is disabled.

examples.title: Group of chips
examples.code:
<TmChipGroup>
    <TmChip Label="React" Removable="true" OnRemove="() => Remove("React")" />
    <TmChip Label="Blazor" Removable="true" OnRemove="() => Remove("Blazor")" />
    <TmChip Label="Vue" Removable="true" OnRemove="() => Remove("Vue")" />
</TmChipGroup>
